description: Style NoteUp the style factor of your casual staples with this pair of flats from portia. Designed for optimum comfort but fashioned to work high-street fashion into your look, we recommend styling this for laidback cool.Product DetailsThong style straps in silver and blue with the braided midfoot strap detailed with shimmer Soft, brown footbedTough outsole with an upraised heel and grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
